title: Zimperium Incident Enrichment
content:
Enriches Zimperium incidents.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (Zimperium, xsoar-supported).

Integrations/scripts used: IsIntegrationAvailable, Zimperium, Zimperium v2.
